changelog: v3.1.0: WEB CONSOLE ENTERPRISE - Refactor completo web proxy con hard timeout 10s, auto-fallback HTTPS/HTTP, bypass SSL self-signed (iLO/firewall/switch), TLS 1.0-1.3, whitelist porte estesa (incluso 9090/10000 per Webmin), response SEMPRE inviata al server (no piu frontend timeout), inline CSS/immagini rate-limited, error page professionale, logging strutturato con latenza in ms.
